product.description:
• Peachy Bum Cloud Soft Diapers are proudly designed in Singapore for our hot and humid climate, giving your baby all-day comfort with clean, trusted protection.
• Made to be ultra-thin yet highly absorbent, our diapers keep little ones cool, dry, and safe —so they can move, play, and sleep comfortably. Featuring a 10% wider absorbent core, Peachy Bum delivers up to 12 hours of leak protection, keeping your baby dry through the night.
• From active days to peaceful nights, one diaper does it all—no switching, no worries. Just soft, breathable comfort your baby deserves, every single day.

metaData.Key Information:
• Peachy Bum Cloud Soft Diapers are not your average diapers. Here’s why parents love them: Clean and gentle you can trust – Double-accredited and suitable for babies with sensitive skin, with quality trusted by local hospitals.
• Up to 12 hours of leak protection – Keeps your baby dry throughout the night so mummies (and daddies) can enjoy a more peaceful sleep.
• Cloud-soft comfort – Incredibly soft on delicate skin and made without lotions, latex, or fragrance. Just pure, premium care for your little one.
metaData.SAP Product Name: [CTN] Peachy Bum Cloud Soft Pant Diapers - XL
metaData.Storage Information:
• The best place to store Peachy Bum Cloud Soft Diapers is in a cool, dry and organised drawer.
• Do avoid direct sunlight and humid areas.

product.description:
This product has a superb absorbent core which allows dual absorption zone for quick absorption and retention of liquid that keeps skin dry. It has an effective Leakage Protection to ensure optimum leakage security. It has a breathable backsheet
that allows good air-flow through, providing maximum comfort. It provides ease of removal. It has a 360˚ soft elastic waistband
that provides comfortable fit even when on the move. It has a blue elastic lines on back of pants to make it easy for wearer to determine the front and back of pants. It has a wetness indicator that changes colour when wet. Regular changing is recommended to keep wearer comfortable.

metaData.Key Information:
• A superb absorbent core which allows dual absorption zone for quick absorption and retention of liquid that keeps skin dry
• Effective leakage protection to ensure optimum leakage security
• Breathable backsheet that allows good air-flow through, providing maximum comfort
• Provides ease of removal
• 360˚ soft elastic waistband that provides comfortable fit even when on the move
• Blue elastic lines on back of pants to make it easy for wearer to determine the front and back of pants
• Wetness indicator that changes colour when wet
metaData.Preparation:
• How to remove & dispose:
1. Tear off seams on both sides to remove
2. Roll up soiled diaper pants and discard into disposal bag

product.description: This product is for overnight use. It has a soft & stretchable 360˚ waistband which provides comfortable fit for baby on the move. It has a superb absorbency core which allows fast absorption and quick drying surface. It has a double leak guard to fit baby's leg comfortably and provides protection against side leakage. It has a colour-changing wetness indicator which changes colour when  wet. It also has a soft & breathable outer cover which allows good air-flow through.

metaData.Key Information:
• Soft & stretchable 360˚ waistband which provides comfortable fit for baby on the move
• Superb absorbency core which allows fast absorption and quick drying surface
• Double leak guard to fit baby's leg comfortably and provides protection against side leakage
• A colour-changing wetness indicator which changes colour when wet
• Soft & breathable outer cover which allows good air-flow through
metaData.Preparation:
• How to wear
1. Pull up like pants with disposal tape behind
2. Ensure leg guards are fitted and not folded to prevent leakage
• How to remove & dispose 1. Tear off seams on both sides to remove
2. Roll up soiled diaper pants and secure it with disposal tape
